channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Health Officials Warn of Disease Risks During Long Rains in Kenya
item.description: The Kenyan Public Health Principal Secretary, Mary Muthoni, has issued a warning to the public that the ongoing March-April-May long rains could increase the risk of water-borne and vector-borne disea...

item.title: AI-Manipulated Satellite Images Mislead Public During US-Iran Tensions
item.description: A recent incident highlights how AI-generated satellite imagery is being used to spread disinformation amid the ongoing US-Iran conflict. An Iranian news outlet shared an image claiming that a US base...

item.title: Kristi Noem’s Tenure at DHS Marked by Controversy and Management Issues
item.description: Kristi Noem’s time as Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) was widely criticized for mismanagement and controversial decisions. Appointed without prior national security experience, ...

item.title: Montreal Considers Sanctuary City Designation to Support Undocumented Migrants
item.description: Some community organisations in Montreal are advocating for the city to be declared a sanctuary city, a status that would allow undocumented migrants to access essential services without fear of depor...

item.title: IPMAN Urges FG to Supply Crude Oil at Subsidised Rates to Dangote Refinery Amid Rising Petrol Prices
item.description: The Independent Petroleum Marketers Association of Nigeria (IPMAN) don beg the federal government make dem sell crude oil to Dangote Refinery with subsidised price instead of the normal international ...

item.title: Israeli-Lebanon conflict escalates amid Iran's appointment of new supreme leader
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have sharply intensified as Israeli military operations in Lebanon have resulted in nearly 400 fatalities, including women and children, amid ongoing hostilities with Iran....

item.title: PM Urges Tanzanians to Uphold Peace and Moral Values
item.description: Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba has urged Tanzanians to keep protecting the country’s reputation as an island of peace and a safe haven for people facing challenges. Speaking at the 9th Quran memori...

item.title: Flash floods in Nairobi claim 23 lives and cause major disruption at airport
item.description: Overnight flash floods in Nairobi have tragically claimed at least 23 lives and caused widespread disruption across the city. Aid workers recovered bodies from submerged streets, with many victims tra...

item.title: Sarunrat Puagpipat Shares Her Admiration for the Philippines During Visit
item.description: Sarunrat Puagpipat, the first runner-up of Miss Grand International 2025, recently visited the Philippines and expressed her deep appreciation for the country. During her stay, she explored various cu...

item.title: Maharashtra Suspends Teachers Over Misuse of AI to Aid Students in Board Exams
item.description: According to the information available from NDTV, certain teachers in Maharashtra were suspended by the education authorities for allegedly helping students use ChatGPT to cheat in their board examina...

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei Appointed as Iran's New Supreme Leader After Father's Assassination
item.description: Iran's Assembly of Experts has appointed Mojtaba Khamenei, the 56-year-old son of the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as the country's third Supreme Leader. This decision came shortly after Ali Khamenei ...

item.title: UK urged to boost defence spending amid rising missile and drone threats
item.description: The UK faces increasing risks from missile and drone attacks similar to those experienced in the Gulf and during Russia's invasion of Ukraine. General Sir Richard Barrons, who contributed to the gover...

item.title: U.S. Allocates $20 Billion to Insure Shipping Through the Strait of Hormuz Amid Tensions
item.description: The U.S. Development Finance Corporation (DFC) has announced a $20 billion plan to re-insure maritime transit through the Strait of Hormuz. This initiative aims to prevent a prolonged disruption of oi...

item.title: African airlines struggle as Middle East airspace closes due to Iran conflict
item.description: Since the United States and Israel launched a military strike against Iran on 28 February 2026, the Middle Eastern airspace has been mostly closed, causing huge problems for African airlines. Countrie...

item.title: Conflict in the Middle East escalates as Iran appoints new leader and regional attacks intensify
item.description: The ongoing Middle East conflict between Iran, the US, and Israel has entered its second week with escalating violence and no resolution in sight. Mojtaba Khamenei, son of the late Supreme Leader Ali ...

item.title: Keith Urban Aims to Spend More Time with Daughters Post-Divorce from Nicole Kidman
item.description: Country music star Keith Urban is reportedly making efforts to increase quality time with his two daughters, Sunday Rose (17) and Faith Margaret (15), following the finalization of his divorce from ac...

item.title: Exploring Madrid and Valencia: A Journey Through Spain’s Culture and Mediterranean Charm
item.description: Madrid and Valencia offer travellers a contrasting yet complementary experience of Spain. Madrid, the nation’s capital, pulses with history, art, and vibrant urban life. Visitors can explore the Royal...

item.title: Floods in Kenya Leave 42 Dead, Nairobi Suffers Most
item.description: Kenya is currently dealing with severe flooding, with the national death toll now at 42. Nairobi has suffered the most, recording 26 fatalities, while the Eastern region has reported 10 deaths. The Ri...

item.title: SACP calls for a 'conference of the Left' including ANC and EFF to address inequality
item.description: The South African Communist Party (SACP) has announced plans to host a 'conference of the Left', inviting the ANC alongside the EFF. This initiative comes amid tensions in the traditional tripartite a...

item.title: Alex Eala expresses support for Coco Gauff's recovery after injury
item.description: Filipino tennis player Alex Eala has expressed her heartfelt support for American tennis star Coco Gauff, wishing her a speedy recovery following a recent injury. Eala described Gauff as an 'amazing c...
